title: DodagState hysteresis: verify the refactored logic is equivalent
description: In python/src/lichen/rpl/dodag.py select_parent(), the hysteresis logic was refactored from nested if statements to a functional style using .filter(). The original logic was: 'if best_cost > current_cost - threshold: keep current'. The new logic is: 'improvement = current_cost - best_cost; if improvement < threshold: keep current'. These are mathematically equivalent (improvement < threshold == best_cost > current_cost - threshold), but verify this change doesn't alter behavior. The test test_does_not_switch_without_meaningful_improvement should catch regressions.
